task_completion.description: Draw the structural layout of the Annex Suite with all required rooms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagram in draw.io showing distinct rooms or areas labeled 'Reception', 'Workspace', 'Conference Room', 'Kitchen', and 'Server Closet'.

task_completion.description: Incorporate all required standard safety symbols and markers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Red fire extinguishers in the Kitchen and Workspace, a red fire alarm pull station near the Main Entrance, green exit signs at the Main Entrance and Emergency Exit, a 'You Are Here' marker in the Reception area, and an Assembly Point labeled 'Parking Lot A' outside the building layout.

task_completion.description: Document primary and secondary egress paths using specific arrow styles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Solid green arrows pointing from the Workspace to the Main Entrance (primary route) and dashed green arrows pointing from the Workspace to the Emergency Exit (secondary route).

task_completion.description: Include a legend explaining all symbols used in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct box or area on the canvas labeled 'Legend' (or similar) that defines the visual meaning of the safety symbols and arrows used in the plan.

task_completion.description: Save the editable diagram as evacuation_plan.drawio on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io application title bar showing 'evacuation_plan.drawio', or a file manager/terminal window showing the file 'evacuation_plan.drawio' located in the Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG image to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or image viewer showing the file 'evacuation_plan.png' successfully created in the Desktop directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io Desktop GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application open with the diagram visible on the canvas, demonstrating GUI interaction rather than terminal-based XML generation.

integrity.description: The agent manually placed shapes and lines on the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of selecting shapes from the sidebar, dragging them onto the canvas, and formatting them (e.g., changing colors to red/green, changing line styles to dashed) within the draw.io interface.

integrity.description: The PNG file is a genuine graphical export of the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu option in draw.io, and the resulting PNG file is an actual image of the evacuation plan, not a renamed text file or blank image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The layout must contain exactly 5 rooms: reception, workspace, conference, kitchen, and server. The diagram must include at least 3 types of safety symbols: extinguisher, alarm, and exit. There must be a minimum of 2 green egress path edges (arrows) for the evacuation routes. The final outputs must be located at /home/ga/Desktop/evacuation_plan.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/evacuation_plan.png.
